S.FORM: Kevin Allison kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 2, Kevin Allison, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ke*in allis~ɕon kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ke*in allis~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
